notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 41 CVEs: CVE-2020-36558, CVE-2022-1158, CVE-2022-2503, CVE-2022-2639, CVE-2022-2873, and 36 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
